query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A sheer curtain panel hanging in front of a window, with bright daylight streaming through the translucent fabric from the upper right. A metal curtain ring is visible near the lower center of the frame, catching light. The fabric gathers and folds in vertical drapes, creating layered textures where light passes through. The left side of the frame falls into deep shadow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A sheer curtain panel hanging in front of a window, with intense daylight blown out in the upper right, streaming through the translucent fabric. A metal curtain ring catches light near the lower center. The left two-thirds of the frame is crushed to near-black underexposure, with minimal visible detail, while the lit portions appear in heavily desaturated sepia-brown tones with low tonal separation throughout. The image is framed at a tilted angle, with the curtain edge running diagonally across the composition, creating an unstable, off-kilter orientation.
